Macro Definition Documentation

◆ MATHFUNC

#define MATHFUNC (   NAME,
  FCT,
  DFCT 
)
Value:
template <typename T> \
class NAME { \
public : \
typedef typename T::value_type value_type; \
static inline value_type getValue(const T & left, const T & right, int index) \
{ \
return std::FCT(left.getValue(index)); \
} \
static inline value_type getDerivedValue(const T & left, const T & right, int ligne, int colonne) \
{ return DFCT;}; \
}; \
template <typename T> \
inline Expr<T , NAME<T>, T > FCT(const T & a) { \
typedef NAME<T> value_type; \
return Expr<T , NAME<T>, T > (a,a); \
} \
Expr
Expr : Manipulation des expressions.
Definition: Expr.h:29

Operations mathematiques sur les tableaux.

Definition des operations mathematiques applicables aux tableaux.
Les operations sin, asin, sinh, cos, acos, acosh, tan, atan, atanh, exp, sqrt, log, log10 et abs sont implementes.
Macro permettant de generer les operations mathematiques

Definition at line 17 of file MathFunc.h.
